assertions.text: Agent runs dependency verification before any command
assertions.evidence: Baseline checked 'which maestro' instead of the specified verify commands. Did not check xcrun simctl help.

assertions.text: Agent creates a Maestro flow file following the {feature}-{action}.yaml pattern in maestro/ directory
assertions.evidence: Created login_flow.yaml (underscore, not kebab-case) in the outputs directory, not in maestro/ directory.

assertions.text: The generated Maestro YAML includes appId: com.example.app
The flow includes tapOn, inputText steps for email and password fields, and a Submit tap action
assertions.evidence: Flow includes tapOn by id/text for email and password, inputText, and tapOn Submit.

assertions.text: The flow includes an assertVisible step to verify successful login
assertions.evidence: No assertVisible step in the flow. Flow ends at tapOn Submit without verification.

assertions.text: The Maestro flow file does not contain hardcoded absolute file paths
assertions.evidence: No absolute paths in the YAML.

assertions.text: Agent reads the flow file to check for structural errors before attempting maestro test
assertions.evidence: Baseline ran maestro test directly without reading the flow file first.

assertions.text: Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report with Maestro Flow Results section
assertions.evidence: Created run_report.md but not in the Simulator Session Report format. No Maestro Flow Results section as specified.
